reasoning: Query asks for Tohoku cherry blossom spots, but get_spots returns generic Akita shrines, kofun, and small museums with no sakura tagging. None of the famous Akita hanami spots (Kakunodate, Hirosaki adjacent) appear. Data is real but fails the intent.
missing_data: Famous Tohoku cherry sites (Kakunodate Bukeyashiki-dori, Senshu Park, Hirosaki Castle), bloom-period metadata, body paragraphs mentioning sakura.
improvement_hint: Add a theme/keyword filter (e.g. 'cherry_blossom') and surface body_paragraphs containing 桜/sakura when topic implies seasonal flora.

reasoning: User asks for sake breweries in Niigata; tool returns MAFF GI items (Kurosaki edamame, Tsunan carrots, Oguchi renkon) — food but not sake. No sake breweries are surfaced even though Niigata is Japan's top sake region. Wrong tool selection / missing brewery dataset.
missing_data: Major Niigata sake breweries (Hakkaisan, Kubota/Asahi Shuzo, Kakurei, Hakurakusei etc.), brewery addresses, tasting room info.
improvement_hint: Add a dedicated breweries dataset (NTA sake brewery registry) or expose category='sake' under specialty/POI tools.

reasoning: Hakuba ski + onsen request returned a museum, alpine garden, and three village-office admin pages. None of the Hakuba ski resorts (Happo-One, Goryu, Iwatake) or onsen (Hakuba Happo Onsen, Mimizuku-no-Yu) appear. Municipal_scrape pages are nav-chrome.
missing_data: Hakuba ski resorts, hot-spring facilities, lift-pass info, onsen with day-use availability.
improvement_hint: Index ski_resort and onsen as POI types; downrank village-office admin pages whose only signal is the address.

reasoning: Kansai foliage query returns Kyoto kofun, shrines, and museums — none of the canonical autumn spots (Tofuku-ji, Arashiyama, Eikando, Kiyomizu). Generic ranking by quality_score with no seasonal/foliage signal.
missing_data: Canonical koyo spots, peak-bloom windows, body_paragraphs mentioning 紅葉.
improvement_hint: Surface attractions tagged with foliage keywords from body_paragraphs; rank temples/gardens above kofun for tourism intents.

reasoning: Arabic cherry-blossom query for Kansai → Nara kofun and folk museums. Yoshino, Mt. Wakakusa, Naraikoma absent. Intent not addressed; ranking is non-thematic.
missing_data: Yoshinoyama, Mt. Wakakusa, Heijo-kyo cherry spots, Nara-koen; bloom dates.
improvement_hint: Add seasonal keyword facet; multi-prefecture aggregation when query is region-level (Kansai).

reasoning: Stargazing on Okinawa remote islands → returns Naha museums and Nakagusuku Castle. No Iriomote, Hateruma, Ishigaki dark-sky data. Ranking ignores geography (離島) and theme (星空).
missing_data: Iriomote/Hateruma/Ishigaki island assets, Iriomote-Ishigaki National Park dark sky designation, observatory info.
improvement_hint: Tag islands and dark-sky parks; allow region='Yaeyama/Miyako' filter rather than only prefecture-level.

reasoning: Thai query for rural Hokkaido onsen ryokan returns mostly Sapporo/Kushiro chain hotels (ANA properties) plus a Niseko apartment. Constraint 'rural' (chihou) and 'onsen' is ignored — only one entry has lodging_type=onsen_ryokan tagging in the visible window.
missing_data: Noboribetsu, Lake Toya, Sounkyo, Tokachigawa, Akan-ko ryokan; type='onsen_ryokan' filter.
improvement_hint: Expose lodging_type filter (already in schema) and rank rural municipalities above prefectural capital for 'countryside' queries.

reasoning: Vietnamese query about Seto Inland Sea islands → Kagawa museums and kofun. No Naoshima, Teshima, Shodoshima, Ogijima. Tool selection failed to leverage island metadata.
missing_data: Art islands (Naoshima, Teshima, Inujima), Shodoshima, ferry info.

reasoning: Returns 3 METI traditional crafts including Awa Indigo-dyed washi — directly aishi-relevant. Awa Hon-ai Shijira (indigo weave) also matches. However workshops/experiences (体験) aren't surfaced; only designations.
missing_data: Aizome workshops in Tokushima city (e.g. BUAISOU, Aizumi Indigo Museum), pricing, booking URLs.

reasoning: Mt. Koya shukubo request → Wakayama hotels in Tanabe, Kushimoto, Shirahama. None on Koyasan; no shukubo (e.g. Eko-in, Henjoson-in, Fukuchi-in). Geographic scope of returned hotels misses the actual area.

reasoning: Strong matches: Matsue Buke Yashiki (Shimane), Old Uchiyama Family (Fukui), Aizu Bukeyashiki (Fukushima), Nagamachi (Kanazawa) — all outside Kyoto. But results also surface generic prefecture overview pages (Saga, Kyoto unrelated) that bury the real assets.
missing_data: Hagi (Yamaguchi), Chiran (Kagoshima), Kakunodate (Akita) explicit entries.
improvement_hint: Filter search_area results by entity-level confidence; downrank prefecture-overview scrape pages when q is a noun phrase for an asset class.

reasoning: Returns 3 Akita festivals (Dainichido Bugaku, Kakunodate, Tsuchizaki Shinmei) — all real. But Kanto Matsuri, Omagari Hanabi, Nebuta-style events absent. national_heritage section drifts into Iwate/Saitama/Mie/Aichi which doesn't help an Akita summer query. Date metadata mostly null.

reasoning: Korean query about San'in small fishing port towns → Shimane museums, kofun, castles. No Mihonoseki, Hamada, Tsunozu fishing villages. Tool gives no fishing-village signal.
missing_data: Coastal fishing villages, port info, ferry data.

reasoning: Returns 9 Gifu crafts. Mino Washi (visible class) likely listed but also includes Mino-yaki ceramics, Hidehira-nuri (Iwate-shared), Hida Shunkei lacquer — washi-specific items get diluted. Workshops (e.g. Mino-shi Washi-no-Sato) absent.

reasoning: 84 results but dominated by Tottori sand-dune pages and irrelevant prefecture overviews (Saga, Yamagata, Kumamoto) where 砂丘 appears tangentially. Genuine lesser-known dunes (Nakatajima Shizuoka, Sayama Aomori, Fukiage Kagoshima) not surfaced.

reasoning: 4 Shimane crafts in Chinese (Iwami-yaki, Sekishu washi, Unshu abacus, Izumo stone lantern) — all official METI designations, with descriptions and production areas. Direct, accurate, well-translated. Could add Tottori entries since 山陰 spans both prefectures.

reasoning: Lavender beyond Furano query → Hokkaido kofun, shell mounds, Ainu Museum, Kamifurano Folk Museum. No actual lavender farms (Tomita Farm, Choei Farm, Higashimokoto, Sapporo Satoland). Theme keyword unmatched.

reasoning: Filipino query about traditional towns in Kyushu (topic=九州古い町並み) → Oita kofun and small museums (Hachiman Kamado, Amabe). Famous old towns (Hita Mameda, Kitsuki, Yufuin streetscape, Usuki) absent. Tool returns generic POIs.

reasoning: Mountain shrines on Kii Peninsula → Japan Heritage stories about whaling and Wakanoura scenic beauty. Misses Kumano Sanzan (Hongu, Hayatama, Nachi) and Koyasan — even though they are the canonical mountain religious sites. Wrong heritage stories surfaced.

reasoning: Niigata festivals returns count=0 then dumps national_heritage list (Akita, Iwate, Saitama, Toyama, Mie, Aichi) — none in Niigata. Nagaoka Hanabi, Kashiwazaki Fireworks absent. The fallback list is misleading for a Niigata-fireworks query.
